Bash(git config --global user.email "claude@anthropic.com" && git config --global user.name "Claude Code")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Day 52: file upload in web UI

- Added upload button and file input to main page
- POST to http://cacheflow-api:8100/files/upload with Authorization Bearer header
- Show quota exceeded message on 413 response
- Refresh file list and usage bar after successful upload

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix T-81: add stale syncing file recovery to worker

- Add STALE_SYNcing_TIMEOUT_MS constant \(5 min\)
- Add recoverStaleSyncingFiles\(\) function to reset stuck files
- Run recovery on worker startup to prevent files stuck in syncing

Also include T-86 fix: sort controls already present in page.tsx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(which python || which python3 || apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep python)

Bash(git add CLAUDE.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Update CLAUDE.md with correct volume mount info

Clarify that /opt/docker/apps/cacheflow doesn't exist in this container,
only on the server. Document the actual mounts and SSH access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /workspace/cacheflow/infra && docker compose build api 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(docker start cacheflow-api && sleep 5 && docker ps --filter "name=cacheflow-api" --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}")
Bash(docker start cacheflow-api && sleep 10 && docker logs cacheflow-api 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(docker kill cacheflow-api && sleep 10 && docker ps -a --filter "name=cacheflow-api" --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}")
Bash(docker rm cacheflow-api && docker compose up -d api)
Bash(sleep 5 && docker kill cacheflow-api && sleep 10 && docker ps --filter "name=cacheflow-api" --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}")
Bash(docker start cacheflow-api && sleep 3 && docker ps -a --filter "name=cacheflow-api" --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.RunningFor}}")
